description: A glamorous, high-fashion choice in antique gold colour from Inc. 5. With it's sleek design and stylish embellishments, this pair looks great with evening and party wear.  The pearl and diamond encrusted straps really catch the light and will perfectly complement ethnic or Western evening dresses.This pair comes with a shoe bag that helps you pack easily when you travel.Heel: 1"UpperSmooth silver footbed with a synthetic leather patch at heel, ergonomically curved and lightly padded for absolute comfort and styleThong styled straps with a synthetic leather inner lining and pearl and diamond encrusted upperHas a toe separator to hold the foot in place in styleOutsoleDurable outsole with a silver coloured heel unit and horizontal grooves on the heel base for ultimate grip even on smooth surfacesReinforced heel cap for heel durabilitySandal careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
